message:
fix(crates): harden PCS duplicate-member detection and fix rate limiter boundary

- fcp-core: detect duplicate node_id during PcsGroupState construction,
  not just on add_member; simplify add_member to use is_member()
- fcp-ratelimit: fix off-by-one in sliding window expiry (>= instead of >
  for boundary timestamps); drop MutexGuard before returning in
  FixedWindow::time_until_available and status methods

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
